briefs.title: Tobacco and Vapour Retailers Must Display Two New Decals Starting April 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC is replacing old required warning decals for tobacco and vapour product sellers with two new ones — one facing customers at the cash register, and one facing staff at the point of sale.
briefs.action_required: Replace your current tobacco/vapour decals with the two new required decals before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC tobacco and vapour new decal requirements take effect
